issues_before_repair.message: Back matter heading was detected inside clean body.
Publisher header/footer boilerplate remains in body text.
Many figure/table caption paragraphs remain in body text.

issues_after_repair.message: Many figure/table caption paragraphs remain in body text.

repairs_applied.message: Removed back matter from clean body and parsed reference-like tail entries.
Removed article-info or publisher boilerplate from abstract.
Trimmed title/authors/abstract/front matter before main body heading: ## 1. Introduction
Moved figure captions out of clean body.
Moved table captions out of clean body.
Moved table-like blocks out of clean body.
Normalized inline/display math spans inside clean body.
Dropped equation candidates that looked like prose/table labels rather than formulas.
Normalized formula spacing, common OCR symbols, and simple LaTeX temperature/unit forms.
Sorted numbered references after extraction order appeared scrambled.
